title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: My journey from networking basics to advanced penetration testing and SOC operations.

title: IT & Networking Fundamentals
description: Mastering the basics of how computers and networks communicate (OSI model, TCP/IP, Linux basics).

title: Security Foundations
description: Understanding core security concepts, cryptography, and basic vulnerabilities. Preparing for CompTIA Security+.

title: SOC & Incident Response
description: Learning SIEM tools (Splunk), analyzing logs, and handling security incidents.

title: Offensive Security
description: Learning how attackers operate to better defend against them. Penetration testing basics.

title: Custom Packet Sniffer
description: A Python-based tool that intercepts and logs network traffic to understand packet structures.

title: SIEM Lab Setup
description: Deployed and configured ELK Stack in a virtual environment to ingest and analyze pfSense firewall logs.

title: Understanding the OSI Model
summary: A deep dive into how data travels across networks layer by layer.
